TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Nicaragua, title = Nicaragua, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nicaragua} }

S.FORM: Nicaragua Itini i 13 00 N, 85 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Nicaragua. Polong no sekalay i 130,370 sq km "saka 98 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 119,990 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 10,380 sq km " Polong i 5,966,798 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 42.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 25.30%, malo no roma to a sera 32.50%. siyoto O (((Managua)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasiwa 15 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Daniel Ortega , patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 10 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ni ¶ara*o~u~ua itini i ** ** n, ** ** w, no~uno~utimo~u…ĺan ami…ĺika ko~u ni ¶ara*o~u~ua. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((mana*o~u~ua)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakasiwa ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …¨~…ģani…ô…ĺ o~urt…ô*a , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Nicaragua Itini i 13 00 N, 85 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Nicaragua. Polong no sekalay i 130,370 sq km "saka 98 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 119,990 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 10,380 sq km " Polong i 5,966,798 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 42.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 25.30%, malo no roma to a sera 32.50%. siyoto O (((Managua)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasiwa 15 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Daniel Ortega , patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 10 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ni ¶ara*o~u~ua itini i ** ** n, ** ** w, no~uno~utimo~u…ĺan ami…ĺika ko~u ni ¶ara*o~u~ua. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan.
